root.rep_text: หนังสือยืนยันยอด

adtm_data.text: วันที่ข้อมูล

membership_no.nulltext: ต้องการดูแค่รายคน

root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance as share_stock, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate , coalesce( ( select sum( coalesce( data_balance , 0 ) ) from sc_cls_confirm_data where sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and confirm_date = '!adtm_data_1!' and data_group = 'LON' and coalesce( data_balance , 0 ) > 0 ) , 0 ) as sum_balanace,
pka_com_function.fp_get_coopname() as coop_name, '!adtm_data_1!' as adtm_data, '!adtm_data_1!' as adtm_edate, '!adtm_return_1!' as adtm_return, '!adtm_appointment_1!' as adtm_appointment, (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_cls_confirm_data where ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no ) and ( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = 'SH' ) and ( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > 0 ) --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' )
/*WHERE*/ and ( sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '!adtm_data_1!' ) --and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '012001' and '012001' )
order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no

r_ktm_confirm_share_loan_dep_nest_emer.sql: --nest emer ตัวที่ 1 select sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno as emer_contract , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance as emer_balance from sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '!adtm_data_1!' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '01' and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = {0} order by sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno

r_ktm_confirm_share_loan_dep_nest_norm.sql: --nest="" norm ตัวที่ 2 select sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno as norm_contract , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance as norm_balance from sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '!adtm_data_1!' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '02' and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = {0} order by sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno

r_ktm_confirm_share_loan_dep_nest_spec.sql: --nest="" spec ตัวที่ 3 select sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno as spec_contract , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance as spec_balance from sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_lon_m_rule where sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '!adtm_data_1!' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03' and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = {0} order by sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno

r_ktm_confirm_share_loan_dep_nest_dep.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_form_depno(deposit_account_no) as form_depno , deposit_account_no , deposit_account_name , deposit_balance from sc_cls_mon_dep_accno where membership_no = {0} and monthly_date = '!adtm_data_1!' order by deposit_account_no
